content.Text:
[Sun 2026-04-19 12:00 CDT] You are working on a GA4 analytics dashboard for Brian Harris BMW (a luxury auto dealership). 

**File to edit:** `/Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/brian-harris-bmw-dashboard.html`

**Task:** Add a new "Top Content Pages — Avg Time on Page" section to the dashboard.

**What to add:**
A new section after the existing "🔑 Top 10 Model Pages" section and before the "🚨 High Bounce Rate URLs" section. It should show a table of top content pages with:
- Rank
- Page name (human-readable, not raw URL)
- Sessions
- Avg Time on Page (formatted as "2:34" style)
- Engagement color indicator (green = >2min, yellow = 1-2min, red = <1min)

**Data to use (hardcoded, realistic for a BMW dealership):**
1. BMW X5 Model Page — 3,504 sessions — 3:42
2. BMW X3 Model Page — 2,831 sessions — 3:18
3. Service Specials — 1,900 sessions — 1:12
4. New Inventory — 2,634 sessions — 2:05
5. Certified Pre-Owned — 2,406 sessions — 2:51
6. BMW X5 vs Lexus RX — 847 sessions — 4:33
7. Oil Change Special — 996 sessions — 0:58
8. BMW 3 Series Model Page — 1,083 sessions — 3:05
9. Finance Application — 612 sessions — 2:17
10. Schedule Service — 741 sessions — 1:44

**Design requirements:**
- Match the existing dark dashboard style exactly (dark background #111, borders #1a1a1a, same table styles as `.comparison-table`)
- Section title format: "📄 Top Content Pages — Avg Time on Page"  
- Subtitle: "Ranked by sessions · Last 90 Days · GA4 Property 334199347"
- Add a small colored dot or badge next to the time: 
  - 🟢 green (#10b981) for ≥ 2:00
  - 🟡 yellow (#f59e0b) for 1:00–1:59
  - 🔴 red (#ef4444) for < 1:00
- Add a footer note: "Avg time on page indicates content depth and user intent. Pages >2:00 signal high buying intent."
- Use the same `.chart-card` wrapper and `.section` structure as the rest of the dashboard

**Important:** Only add this new section. Do not change anything else in the file. Insert it between the "🔑 Top 10 Model Pages" section and the High Bounce Rate div.

After making the change, confirm what you added and where you inserted it.
Let me read the file to understand the structure and find the insertion point.

I can see the structure. The new section goes after the "Top 10 Model Pages" section (ends at line 237) and before the High Bounce Rate div (starts at line 244). I'll insert it between the closing `` of the insights card (line 241) and the closing `` of the content div (line 242), but actually looking more carefully — the insertion point should be after line 237 (end of Top 10 Model Pages section) and before line 238 (the insights card).

content.Text:
Done. I inserted the new **"📄 Top Content Pages — Avg Time on Page"** section at line ~238, between the "Top 10 Model Pages" section and the "Key Insights" card (which precedes the High Bounce Rate section).

**What was added:**
- A `.section` wrapper with the title "📄 Top Content Pages — Avg Time on Page"
- A `.chart-card` containing a `.comparison-table` with columns: Rank, Page, Sessions, Avg Time on Page
- 10 rows sorted by sessions (descending), each with a colored dot indicator:
  - **Green** (#10b981): BMW X5 (3:42), BMW X3 (3:18), New Inventory (2:05), Certified Pre-Owned (2:51), BMW 3 Series (3:05), BMW X5 vs Lexus RX (4:33), Finance Application (2:17)
  - **Yellow** (#f59e0b): Service Specials (1:12), Schedule Service (1:44)
  - **Red** (#ef4444): Oil Change Special (0:58)
- Subtitle: "Ranked by sessions · Last 90 Days · GA4 Property 334199347"
- Footer note about avg time on page and buying intent
The file /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/ga4-dashboards/brian-harris-bmw-dashboard.html has been updated successfully.
